artifact_classes.description: What the network is trying to achieve.
How the network pursues the aim.
What the network can do repeatedly.
What the network is not allowed to do.
How the network decides if work succeeded.
What the network can safely call.
What the network uses as evidence.

bounded_realization: This proof does not claim achieved superintelligence or Kardashev Type II civilization. It makes the capital-to-capability-to-reinvestment mechanism testable through proof-carrying agent upgrades.

doctrine: Anything that can improve is an Artifact.
Anything that changes must carry Proof.
Anything that propagates must pass the Evolution Gate.

goals_used.direction: Every agent job should produce a commitment, execution trace, proof receipt, and evolution decision.
goals_used.name: Convert work into proof-carrying intelligence

goals_used.direction: Accepted upgrades should improve future holdout work and benchmark value capture.
goals_used.name: Increase compounding productive capability

goals_used.direction: Represent capital → compute → agents → artifacts → proof → evolution → reinvestment without claiming achieved superintelligence.
goals_used.name: Make the Kardashev-scale value mechanism testable

goals_used.direction: No upgrade may propagate unless it passes eval, approval, canary, monitoring, rollback, and scope controls.
goals_used.name: Protect propagation with proof gates

goals_used.direction: High-value-looking but unsafe, ungrounded, or policy-violating candidates must be blocked.
goals_used.name: Reject adversarial shortcuts

goals_used.direction: A non-technical viewer should see goals, plans, skills, graphs, receipts, and claim boundaries without reading code.
goals_used.name: Keep the public proof legible

goals_used.direction: The root remains the Public SkillOS Command Center while Proof Gradient appears as a proof room.
goals_used.name: Preserve operational sovereignty

incremental_position: Third Proof Gradient proof: every job becomes a commitment, every execution carries proof, and only proof-gated upgrades propagate.

plans_used.name: Commit Contract Route
plans_used.strategy: Turn each job into an explicit contract before execution.

plans_used.name: Stateless Execution Fabric Route
plans_used.strategy: Resolve only the artifacts needed for the run, execute, and emit proof.

plans_used.name: Proof Ledger Route
plans_used.strategy: Append evidence for every run so learning becomes infrastructure rather than mythology.

plans_used.name: Evolution Gate Route
plans_used.strategy: Allow only proven upgrades to propagate across authorized agents.

plans_used.name: Kardashev Value Ladder Route
plans_used.strategy: Model whether proof-carrying upgrades increase the rate of capability reinvestment.

plans_used.name: Public Sovereignty Route
plans_used.strategy: Publish the Command Center root and this proof page as separate, verified public artifacts.

public_claim_boundary: This is a deterministic benchmark proof artifact, not audited customer ROI.

It does not claim achieved superintelligence, Kardashev Type II civilization, guaranteed wealth, investment returns, financial advice, legal advice, medical advice, employment advice, credit advice, policy advice, or token advice.
It tests whether proof-carrying upgrades outperform static and ungated baselines while preserving risk, rollback, evidence, and public-root constraints.
quote_to_realize: A superintelligent machine would be of such immense value, with so much wealth accruing to any company that owned one, that it could allow us to reach Kardashev Type II civilization level

skills_used.name: Aim Artifact Compilation
skills_used.purpose: Convert a grand mission into measurable goals with thresholds and safe public boundaries.
skills_used.verifier: weights sum to 1.0 and thresholds are explicit

skills_used.name: Commit Contract Synthesis
skills_used.purpose: Transform agent work from a prompt into a contract with success, failure, budget, and eval rules.
skills_used.verifier: commit includes goal, criteria, constraints, tools, evals, approvals

skills_used.name: Strategy Graph Resolution
skills_used.purpose: Resolve the plan graph needed for each commitment without loading the whole universe into one agent.
skills_used.verifier: all plan edges link to goals, policies, and skills

skills_used.input: versioned skills, plan graph, policy scope
skills_used.name: Capability Artifact Binding
skills_used.purpose: Bind reusable skills to the commitments and plans they are authorized to serve.
skills_used.verifier: skill declares input, output, verifier, version, and scope

skills_used.input: agent execution, tools, context, cost, latency, decisions
skills_used.name: Execution Trace Capture
skills_used.purpose: Record what the agent actually did so improvement is based on evidence, not claims.
skills_used.verifier: trace hash, timestamp, and run ID are present

skills_used.name: Proof Receipt Assembly
skills_used.purpose: Turn traces into proof receipts containing scores, errors, feedback, and credit assignment.
skills_used.verifier: receipt includes score, policy, cost, latency, errors, success/failure

skills_used.name: Credit Assignment Gradient
skills_used.purpose: Identify which artifacts caused improvement or regression and produce a signed upgrade signal.
skills_used.verifier: gradient sign matches holdout delta and risk delta

skills_used.input: candidate upgrade, proof score, risk score, negative controls
skills_used.name: Evolution Gate Adjudication
skills_used.purpose: Accept, revise, reject, retire, or canary upgrades based on proof rather than rhetoric.
skills_used.verifier: decision satisfies eval, approval, canary, monitor, rollback, scope

skills_used.input: accepted upgrade and compatible agent roles
skills_used.name: Canary Propagation Control
skills_used.purpose: Roll out proven upgrades to a scoped subset before network-wide propagation.

skills_used.name: Rollback Sentinel
skills_used.purpose: Make every propagated upgrade reversible if live evidence regresses.

skills_used.name: Negative-Control Treasury
skills_used.purpose: Maintain adversarial upgrade candidates that should look tempting but must not propagate.

skills_used.input: receipt, report, metrics, goals, plans, skills
skills_used.name: Executive Evidence Rendering
skills_used.purpose: Render goals, plans, skills, graphs, tables, and claim boundaries into a beautiful public proof page.
skills_used.verifier: required sections and internal links pass verification

subtitle: Commit → Execute → Prove → Evolve

systems.name: Artifact Vault
systems.role: Stores immutable, versioned, scoped, signed, auditable, rollbackable intelligence artifacts.

systems.name: Execution Fabric
systems.role: Runs agents statelessly: resolve artifacts → execute → emit proof.

systems.name: Proof Ledger
systems.role: Append-only evidence memory: every run, score, correction, failure, and success.

systems.name: Evolution Gate
systems.role: Turns proof into released upgrades: propose → evaluate → approve → canary → promote → monitor → rollback.

tagline: One agent tries. Proof decides. The network evolves.
title: Proof Gradient · Proof-Carrying Intelligence Treasury

value_ladder.description: Goals, plans, skills, policies, evals, tools, context
Receipts, scores, traces, feedback, credit assignment
Gated upgrades, canaries, rollback, scoped propagation
Validated capability increases future productive capacity
